specific_location: Wildlife Pond just north and west of the main lake at Crown Hill Park.
description: Dark heron with white central breast/belly. Standing on shoreline near great blue heron (which dwarfted it) and snowy egret (this bird slightly larger). As it flew it showed white underwings.Behaviors: Standing hunched at waters edge facing me. Flew a few feet down the shoreline then again stood facing water.Call: nonePlumage: adult
